nasb.text: Let your speech always be with grace, as though seasoned with salt, so that you will know how you should respond to each person.

esv.text: Let your speech always be gracious, seasoned with salt, so that you may know how you ought to answer each person.

cnv.text: 你們的話要常常溫和，好像是用鹽調和的，使你們知道應當怎樣回答各人。

ccb.text: 谈吐要温和、风趣，知道该怎样回答每个人。

csbs.text: 你们的话语总要带着恩惠，像用盐调和过的，好使你们知道该怎样回答每一个人。
